property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Amazon Corretto\jdk17.0.10_7\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Python313\Scripts\;C:\Python313\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Program Files\Amazon Corretto\jdk17.0.10_7\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Maven\Apache-Maven-3.9.6\bin;C:\Apache\apache-maven-3.9.9-bin\apache-maven-3.9.9\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\lib\maven\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Users\perci\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\perci\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\perci\AppData\Local\JetBrains\Toolbox\scripts;C:\Program Files (x86)\SQLite3;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2024.1.1\bin;;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3\Library\bin\conda.bat;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3\Scripts\conda.exe;C:\ProgramData\anaconda3\condabin\conda.bat;C:\Users\perci\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\perci\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\Schniz.fnm_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe;C:\Users\perci\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\PostgreSQL\17\bin;;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Successfully hire a candidate through the recruitment workflow", "End-to-End Hiring Process"](1)
testcase.system-out: @e2e @hiring @happy-path &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Successfully hire a candidate through the recruitment workflow &amp#27;[90m# ./src/test/resources/features/hiring_process.feature:11&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22mthe admin user is logged into the system&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.adminUserIsLoggedIn()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe user should see the Dashboard&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LoginSteps.verifyDashboard()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user navigates to Admin&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.navigateToAdmin()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe user should see the Admin page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.adminPage()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user clicks Job&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.clickJob()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe user selects Job Titles&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.selectJobTitle()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe job title page should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.titleListDisplayed()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user clicks the Add button&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.addTitle()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe user should see the Save Job Title page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.verifySaveJobTitlePage()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user enters job title details and saves&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.AdminJobSetupSteps.saveJobTitle()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin navigates to Recruitment&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentVacancySetupSteps.navigateRecruitment()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the Recruitment page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentVacancySetupSteps.verifyRecruitment()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin clicks Vacancies&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentVacancySetupSteps.clickVacancies()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe vacancy page should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentVacancySetupSteps.verifyVacanciesList()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin adds vacancy&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentVacancySetupSteps.addVacancy()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe save vacancy page should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentVacancySetupSteps.verifyVacancySavePage()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin enters vacancy details and saves&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentVacancySetupSteps.saveVacancy()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin clicks Candidates&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateSetupSteps.clickCandidates()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the candidate page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateSetupSteps.verifyCandidates()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin adds candidate&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateSetupSteps.addCandidate()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the save candidate page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateSetupSteps.verifySaveCandidate()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin enters candidate details and saves&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateSetupSteps.saveCandidate()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the candidate actions page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateSetupSteps.verifyCandidateActions()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe candidate application status should be &amp#27;[1m"Application Initiated"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.candidateApplicationStatus(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin shortlists the candidate&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.shortlistCandidate()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the change candidate status page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.verifyChangeCandidateStatus()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin saves the candidate details&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.saveCandidateDetails()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe candidate application status should be &amp#27;[1m"Shortlisted"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.candidateApplicationStatus(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin schedules an interview&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.scheduleInterview()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the change candidate status page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.verifyChangeCandidateStatus()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin enters interview details and saves&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.saveCandidateInterviewDetails()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe candidate application status should be &amp#27;[1m"Interview Scheduled"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.candidateApplicationStatus(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin marks the interview as passed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.markInterviewPassed()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the change candidate status page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.verifyChangeCandidateStatus()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin saves the candidate details&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.saveCandidateDetails()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe candidate application status should be &amp#27;[1m"Interview Passed"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.candidateApplicationStatus(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin offers the job to the candidate&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.offerJob()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the change candidate status page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.verifyChangeCandidateStatus()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin saves the candidate details&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.saveCandidateDetails()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe candidate application status should be &amp#27;[1m"Job Offered"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.candidateApplicationStatus(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin hires the candidate&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.hireCandidate()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe admin should see the change candidate status page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.verifyChangeCandidateStatus()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe admin saves the candidate details&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.saveCandidateDetails()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22ma success alert should be displayed&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.CommonSteps.verifySuccess()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22mthe candidate application status should be &amp#27;[1m"Hired"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.RecruitmentCandidateLifecycleSteps.candidateApplicationStatus(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22mthe user logs out&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.logout()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32mâœ”&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22mthe user should see the login page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.LogoutSteps.verifyLoginPage()&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
